mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '高风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '中风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS medium_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '低风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '无风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '已忽略' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ignored_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '待回传' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_count, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(created_at, 'localtime') = DATE('now', 'localtime') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_count, COUNT(DISTINCT repo_key) AS distinct_repo_count FROM review_runs

SELECT DATE(created_at, 'localtime') AS day, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '高风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '中风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS medium_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '低风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '无风险' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_risk_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '已忽略' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ignored_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_result = '待回传' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_count FROM review_runs WHERE DATE(created_at, 'localtime') >= DATE('now', '-6 day', 'localtime') GROUP BY DATE(created_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY day ASC

SELECT repository_path AS name, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN immediate_fix = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS immediate_fix_count, SUM(finding_count) AS finding_count FROM review_runs WHERE review_result = '高风险' GROUP BY repository_path ORDER BY total_count DESC, finding_count DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(author_name, ''), author_email, '未知作者') AS name, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN immediate_fix = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS immediate_fix_count, SUM(finding_count) AS finding_count FROM review_runs WHERE review_result = '高风险' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(author_name, ''), author_email, '未知作者') ORDER BY total_count DESC, finding_count DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT repo_key FROM review_runs WHERE repo_key IS NOT NULL AND repo_key != '' ORDER BY repo_key ASC
